**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Jiangling Automobile Group Co., Ltd. (JMCG) represents a massive, Tier-1 national automotive OEM headquarters entity. Despite data structural errors pushing its website to the address field and its scope to the email field, the core data reveals a behemoth. Founded in 1988 and headquartered in Nanchang, Jiangxi, it commands an enormous fully paid-in capital of 1.5 Billion RMB. While the specific insured workforce of this specific corporate holding shell is listed as 196 (acting as group HQ management), JMCG's consolidated group size is massive. Its recovered business scope explicitly confirms full 'development, production, and sales of complete motor vehicles and parts'. Validated by its official domain (jmcg.com.cn), this is the holding entity of one of China's premier commercial and passenger vehicle manufacturing conglomerates, closely partnered historically with Ford and Isuzu.

**Risk Profile Summary:**
Trust Tier: **L1_REGISTERED** (Score: 81)
Operational Status: ACTIVE / NATIONAL AUTO OEM HOLDING GROUP
